final_plan:
#Task1: Retrieve historical work order information for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 up to the end of June 2020.
#Agent1: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: A list of work orders for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 up to June 2020.

#Task2: Analyze the retrieved historical work order data to identify any anomalies, alerts, or maintenance needs for Chiller 9.
#Agent2: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: An analysis of the work orders, highlighting any anomalies, alerts, or maintenance needs.

#Task3: Prioritize maintenance work orders for Chiller 9 in July 2020 based on the analysis of historical data.
#Agent3: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency3: #S1 #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: A prioritized list of work orders for Chiller 9 with equipment ID CWC04009 for July 2020.
